name: pnp-copilot-pro-dev-da-ristorante-api-devproxy-entra
title: Browse the menu and place an order at a local Italian restaurant using Microsoft 365 Copilot, Dev Proxy and Entra authentication
shortDescription: This sample demonstrates how to build a declarative agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot that allows you to browse a menu of a local Italian restaurant and place an order. The agent uses an API plugin to connect to an API secured with OAuth (Microsoft Entra). Dev Proxy is used to simulate the API.
longDescription: This sample demonstrates how to build a declarative agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot that allows you to browse a menu of a local Italian restaurant and place an order. The agent uses an API plugin to connect to an API secured with OAuth (Microsoft Entra). Dev Proxy is used to simulate the API.

thumbnails.alt: Declarative agent showing what's on the menu for lunch
Microsoft 365 Copilot prompting the user to authenticate
Visual Studio Code with Dev Proxy running and dev tunnel connected
